title: Loveless False Charge
hook: Flint was framed after presenting evidence, turning the law itself into a weapon against him.
playerSummary: Flint's conflict with Loveless keeps fugitive pressure, betrayal, and missing evidence in play.
gmTruth: This is a core Flint thread. Use it for cracks inside the Shieldmarshals, institutional betrayal, and the escalating cost of trying to do the right thing inside a corrupted system.
